blocks.body: Future Perfect: Negatives — will not have + V3 for actions that still will not be complete by a certain point in the future.

{"level":"B1–B2","intro":"To make negatives in Future Perfect, we use will not have + V3 or the short form won't have + V3.","rules":[{"label":"Negative form","color":"emerald","text":"The basic pattern is subject + will not have + V3.","example":"I will not have finished by 6 p.m."},{"label":"Won't have","color":"blue","text":"In speaking and ordinary writing, won't have is very common.","example":"She won't have packed by tomorrow morning."},{"label":"Not complete by then","color":"amber","text":"This shows that the action still will not be complete by that future moment.","example":"They won't have solved the problem by Friday."}]}

{"title":"1. How we build negatives","intro":"The form does not change with the subject. Only the negative after will changes.","items":[{"label":"Full form","title":"will not have + V3","subtitle":"He will not have finished the task by noon."},{"label":"Short form","title":"won't have + V3","subtitle":"We won't have saved enough money by summer."},{"label":"All subjects","title":"I / you / he / she / it / we / they","subtitle":"The structure is the same in every case."},{"label":"Meaning","title":"not completed by then","subtitle":"The result will still not be ready by that point."}]}

{"title":"2. When negatives are useful","sections":[{"label":"Not by a deadline","color":"emerald","description":"Show that an action still will not be complete by a certain time, date, or deadline.","examples":[{"en":"By Friday, we won't have finished the report.","ua":"The work still will not be ready by Friday."},{"en":"By tomorrow evening, she won't have packed everything.","ua":"The result still will not be there by that time."}]},{"label":"Not before another future event","color":"blue","description":"This form works when one action still will not be complete before another future event.","examples":[{"en":"By the time you arrive, I won't have cleaned the kitchen.","ua":"Your arrival will happen before the action is complete."},{"en":"They won't have solved the problem before the meeting starts.","ua":"The result will still not be ready before the other event."}]},{"label":"Delays and unfinished plans","color":"amber","description":"Use it for tasks that will not stay on schedule or meet the plan.","examples":[{"en":"The team won't have completed the app by next month.","ua":"The completion plan is slipping."},{"en":"He won't have saved enough money by summer.","ua":"The needed result still will not be there by summer."}]},{"label":"Still no result","color":"violet","description":"The negative form is useful when you want to stress the absence of a finished result by a future point.","examples":[{"en":"By then, we won't have received the documents.","ua":"The documents still will not be there by then."},{"en":"She won't have learned all the irregular verbs by next week.","ua":"Her learning still will not reach the needed result."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Typical negative patterns","intro":"Look at the most common models.","rows":[{"en":"I won't have finished by 6 p.m.","ua":"won't have finished","note":"the result still will not be ready"},{"en":"She will not have left before the meeting.","ua":"will not have left","note":"the full form sounds more formal"},{"en":"We won't have built the website by next week.","ua":"won't have built","note":"an unfinished plan by a deadline"},{"en":"By then, they won't have learned enough.","ua":"won't have learned","note":"there still will not be enough result by that point"}],"warning":"After won't have, use V3, not the base form of the verb."}

{"title":"4. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Using has after won't.","wrong":"❌ She won't has finished by noon.","right":"✅ She won't have finished by noon."},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Using V1 instead of V3.","wrong":"❌ We won't have finish the task by Friday.","right":"✅ We won't have finished the task by Friday."},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Putting not after have.","wrong":"❌ They will have not completed the work by then.","right":"✅ They will not have completed the work by then."}]}

{"title":"5. Short summary","items":["Negatives in Future Perfect = will not have + V3.","Short form: won't have + V3.","This form shows that an action still will not be complete by a certain future moment or event.","After won't have, always use V3."]}
